missables: Dark Valefor (HD Remaster only): after you gain the airship, a Dark Aeon blocks the path back into Besaid Village. If you return to Besaid and are not prepared to fight Dark Valefor, you will be locked out of the village — including Jecht Sphere 2 outside the temple. Do not return to Besaid unless you are ready for this encounter.

Al Bhed Primer completion reward: once you have collected all 26 Primers, speak to Rin on the Fahrenheit. He rewards you with 99 Underdog's Secret items — a powerful Distillery ingredient. This reward is only available from Rin on the airship after the full set is complete.
sgTip: Haste + Slow are your best tools for Evrae. Slow him, Haste your party — the fight becomes trivial.

subLocations.name: Fahrenheit Deck
subLocations.prose: The Fahrenheit is Cid's airship and the party's base of operations for the remainder of the game — but your access to it comes in two distinct stages separated by the entire Bevelle sequence. The first time you board is during the approach to Bevelle, when Evrae attacks on the external deck. Use the Trigger Command to control the ship's distance: pull back when Evrae is about to act so Cid can fire a missile volley (up to three times total). Slow Evrae and Haste your own party to control the action economy. After defeating Evrae, the Bevelle, Via Purifico, and Highbridge chapters follow — you are not free to roam at that point. Full access to the airship comes only after the Highbridge sequence, when Cid offers you the world map. From that point, use the Navigation, Search, and Input commands to reach every optional area in the game. Speak to Rin on board once you have all 26 Al Bhed Primers to claim 99 Underdog's Secret items.

subLocations.name: Hidden Locations (Secret Coordinates)
subLocations.prose: Four small coordinate-only areas on the world map hold some of the best equipment in the game — each contains nothing but a chest and a Save Sphere, but the equipment inside is exceptional. From the airship Search command, navigate the cursor to the approximate coordinates below and press the search button repeatedly while moving slowly until the area is found. Sanubia Desert (X:12–16, Y:41–45): Tidus's Ascalon with the Double AP ability. Besaid Falls (X:29–32, Y:73–76): Kimahri's Dragoon Lance. Mi'ihen Ruins (X:33–36, Y:55–60): Rikku's Sonar. Battle Site (X:39–43, Y:56–60): Lulu's Phantom Bangle, which absorbs three types of elemental damage.

items.name: Ascalon (Tidus — Double AP) — Sanubia Desert, X:12–16 Y:41–45
Dragoon Lance (Kimahri) — Besaid Falls, X:29–32 Y:73–76
Sonar (Rikku) — Mi'ihen Ruins, X:33–36 Y:55–60
Phantom Bangle (Lulu — absorbs 3 elemental types) — Battle Site, X:39–43 Y:56–60

notes: Coordinates are approximate — move the cursor slowly while pressing Search repeatedly until the destination triggers.
Baaj Temple (X:11–16, Y:57–63) and Omega Ruins (X:69–75, Y:33–38) are also coordinate locations but are covered in their own sublocations.

subLocations.name: Airship Passwords
subLocations.prose: The airship's Input command (accessible from the main command list) accepts three case-sensitive passwords, each unlocking a secret location with a unique weapon or piece of equipment. The passwords can be found by deciphering Al Bhed messages left around Spira. GODHAND: teleports you to a ravine below Mushroom Rock Road; Rikku's Celestial Weapon, the Godhand, is in a chest at the northern tip of the area. VICTORIOUS: opens a secret Besaid Ruins location; climb the tree branch to reach Rikku's Victorious armor, which nullifies three elemental attack types. MURASAME: opens a second Besaid Ruins secret location; cross the platform to claim Auron's Murasame, which grants the One MP Cost ability.

items.name: Godhand (Rikku's Celestial Weapon) — password: GODHAND
Victorious (Rikku — nullifies 3 elemental types) — password: VICTORIOUS
Murasame (Auron — One MP Cost) — password: MURASAME

notes: All passwords are case-sensitive and must be entered in all caps exactly as shown.
Use the 'Input' option in the airship command list — not the Search/coordinates system.
Godhand is Rikku's Celestial Weapon; it must still be powered up with the Mercury Crest and Mercury Sigil to reach full potential.

bosses.strategy: Have Tidus cast Slow on Evrae immediately, then Haste himself and other key party members — the speed advantage is decisive. Use the Trigger Command to pull the ship back when Evrae won't have a turn before Cid's next salvo; keeping Evrae at long range lets Cid unleash a powerful missile volley (usable up to three times). Later in the fight Evrae will cast Haste to counter your Slow — reapply Slow immediately. When Evrae is close, use physical attackers like Tidus, Auron, and Rikku; when at long range, switch to Lulu and Wakka for spells and Blitzball throws. Evrae is resistant to all elements, so non-elemental weapons and raw physicals are more reliable.

Party is locked to Rikku, Tidus, and Wakka — you cannot swap. Geosgaeno is weak to all five elements equally (1.5x: Fire, Lightning, Water, Ice, Holy), so any elemental attack works. Equip armor with Stoneproof and Deathproof to block its Stone Punch and KO Punch. Open with Hastega and Protect, then burn it down with Wakka's Attack Reels or elemental items from Rikku's Mix. If a party member gets swallowed, use the Struggle Trigger Command immediately to escape. Steal Water Gems for extra income. The equipment drop (weapon with No Encounters) is a coveted quality-of-life reward for endgame exploration.

This is a two-phase encounter: fight, then negotiate. Yojimbo has massive physical defense (80) but near-zero magic defense (1) — spam Firaga, Thundaga, or other magic to end the fight quickly. After winning, you are offered his contract. Choose the middle option ('to defeat the most powerful enemies') for the lowest asking price. Haggle: offer roughly one-third of his initial demand, then raise in small increments. A final payment of around 190,000–250,000 Gil is typical. Overpay his daily wages and keep his Compatibility high; max Compatibility makes Zanmato — which one-shots any enemy in the game — far more likely.

Ultima Weapon has no elemental weaknesses — hit with your highest-damage physical attacks. It can inflict Confuse, Silence, and Petrify, so equip armor with status protection or keep Remedies handy. Silence and Darkness can land (95% base resistance — worth trying), but don't rely on it. Steal 10 Doors to Tomorrow (common steal) before finishing the fight; these are used to customize Break Damage Limit on weapons. If you have surplus Gil, Bribe for 99 Pendulums (roughly 1.4 million Gil), which customize Break MP Limit. Drops Lv.3 Key Spheres and equipment with Double Overdrive.

The hardest standard boss in the game. Omega Weapon absorbs all elements — physical-only offense is mandatory, and Break Damage Limit gear is required to make a dent in its 999,999 HP. It is immune to every status ailment. Use Shell and Protect to survive Nova, Ultima, and its brutal physical hits. Steal 30 Gambler's Spirits before killing it. Critically: have Kimahri use Lancet on Omega Weapon to permanently learn Nova, his most powerful Ronso Rage — this is the only source in the game. Trio of 9999 (Rikku Mix) or max Strength are the practical damage solutions. No bribe available.

optionalAreas.name: Remiem Temple
optionalAreas.prose: Reach Remiem Temple by borrowing a Chocobo from the Calm Lands trainer and leaping across to the hidden eastern cliff path via a Chocobo Feather at the southern edge of the Calm Lands. The Chocobo Race here earns the Cloudy Mirror — required to unlock every Celestial Weapon in the game. Al Bhed Primer Vol. XXIV is on the ground just outside the entrance. Belgemine challenges Yuna to a series of Aeon duels; each fight yields a prize. Defeat Belgemine's Bahamut to receive the Flower Sceptre (needed to recruit the Magus Sisters, along with the Blossom Crown from the Monster Arena after capturing one of each Mt. Gagazet monster). After recruiting Yojimbo and Anima, you can fight all eight of Belgemine's aeons; defeating all eight and sending Belgemine to the Farplane earns the Moon Sigil for Nirvana.

items.name: Cloudy Mirror (Chocobo Race — required for all Celestial Weapons)
Al Bhed Primer Vol. XXIV
Lightning Gem x4 (beat Belgemine's Valefor)
X-Potion x30 (beat Belgemine's Ifrit)
Chocobo Feather x10 (beat Belgemine's Ixion)
Mega-Potion x60 (beat Belgemine's Shiva)
Flower Sceptre (beat Belgemine's Bahamut — needed to recruit Magus Sisters)
Shadow Gem x8 (beat Belgemine's Yojimbo)
Stamina Spring x60 (beat Belgemine's Anima)
Shining Gem x40 (beat Belgemine's Magus Sisters)
Magus Sisters (Aeon — Flower Sceptre + Blossom Crown required)
Moon Sigil (Yuna — send Belgemine after defeating all 8 of her Aeons)

optionalAreas.name: Cavern of the Stolen Fayth
optionalAreas.prose: Exit the Calm Lands via the northeast passage, circle past the right side of the Mt. Gagazet bridge, and descend into the gorge — the Cavern entrance is to the left of the Save Sphere. A short distance to the right is the Rusty Sword, a key item needed for Auron's Masamune. Inside, beware Magic Urns: striking the wrong eye triggers a devastating counterattack — weaker parties should Flee. Great Malboros can ambush your party and inflict Bad Breath (Berserk, Confusion, Sleep, Silence) before you can act — equip status protection or lead with a First Strike weapon. To recruit Yojimbo, choose 'To defeat the most powerful of enemies' when asked your purpose, then offer half his asking price plus 1 gil and raise by 1 gil each round. A teleport pad beyond his chamber leads to hidden rooms with additional loot.

items.name: Al Bhed Primer Vol. XXV
Megalixir
Mega-Potion x2
Flexible Arm (teleport pad chamber)
MP Sphere (teleport pad chamber)
Fortune Sphere
Lv. 2 Key Sphere
X-Potion x2 (teleport pad chamber)
Rusty Sword (eastern cliff outside cavern — needed for Auron's Masamune)
Yojimbo (Aeon)

optionalAreas.name: Baaj Temple (Revisit)
optionalAreas.prose: Airship coordinates: X:11–16, Y:57–63. Only Rikku, Tidus, and Wakka can participate here — they are the only party members who can swim. Geosgaeno waits at the temple entrance; equip all three with armor that protects against Petrify and Death if possible, then open with Hastega and Protect. Geosgaeno is weak to all five elements equally (1.5x multiplier — Fire, Lightning, Water, Ice, and Holy all work), so use whatever elemental spells or items you have. If a party member is swallowed, select the Struggle Trigger Command immediately to escape. After the fight, swim south into the deeper water; when the camera angle shifts, search the seafloor crevices along the south wall to find Lulu's Onion Knight. Inside the Chamber of the Fayth, chests in the southwest and southeast corners contain Mega Phoenix x4 and a Megalixir. Six statues line the inner chamber — each must be lit to unlock Anima's fayth. Each statue corresponds to a Destruction Sphere treasure from one of the six earlier Cloisters of Trials. If any statue remains dark, you missed that cloister's Destruction Sphere reward. You can still return to the Zanarkand Dome cloister via the airship and complete its Destruction Sphere puzzle (reward: Magistral Rod) — this is the one Destruction Sphere that cannot be obtained during the main story.

items.name: Mega Phoenix x4 (Chamber of the Fayth — southwest chests)
Megalixir (Chamber of the Fayth — southeast chest)
Onion Knight (Lulu's Celestial Weapon — underwater south of Geosgaeno)
Anima (Aeon — requires all 6 Destruction Sphere treasures collected)

optionalAreas.name: Omega Ruins
optionalAreas.prose: Airship coordinates: X:69–75, Y:33–38. The Omega Ruins is the hardest optional dungeon in the game. It has no map until you explore each room yourself, an extreme random encounter rate, and the most dangerous enemy roster in Spira. The greatest hazard is the Great Malboro, which can ambush your party and immediately use Bad Breath — inflicting Berserk, Confusion, Sleep, Silence, and more before you can take a single action, causing your own party to tear itself apart. Equip armor with protection against Berserk and Confusion, or put a character with a First Strike weapon in the lead so you can act first and use Flee or swap to Yuna. The dungeon is divided into two areas connected by a teleport pad. In the first area, groups of phantom chests appear throughout — some hold real items, but others contain monster encounters that cause the remaining chests in that group to disappear. Activate two dormant glyphs (one to the west, one to the northwest of the entrance) to raise a bridge leading to a chest with a Teleport Sphere. Al Bhed Primer Vol. XXVI lies on the floor just north of a cluster of four phantom chests. Ultima Weapon is accessible via teleport pad at the north end of the first area. In the second area, Omega Weapon waits at the far end — it absorbs all elements including Holy, so only use physical attacks, non-elemental spells like Flare, or Aeon overdrives (Bahamut, Anima, Yojimbo). Critically: have Kimahri use Lancet on Omega Weapon before finishing it off — this is the only way to learn Nova, Kimahri's most powerful Ronso Rage. After Omega Weapon falls, the party is teleported back to the entrance. Walk all the way back to where it stood to collect a Magic Sphere from the chest behind its arena.

items.name: Al Bhed Primer Vol. XXVI
Teleport Sphere (bridge chest — activate both glyphs first)
Friend Sphere (second area — go left from entrance)
Magic Sphere (behind Omega Weapon's arena — walk back after victory)
Doors to Tomorrow x10 (stolen from Ultima Weapon)
Gambler's Spirit x30 (stolen from Omega Weapon — steal twice)

optionalAreas.name: Celestial Weapons
optionalAreas.prose: Each of the seven party members has one Celestial Weapon obtainable after gaining the airship. Each weapon starts with No AP (prevents AP gain) until upgraded with its character's Crest and Sigil. Fully upgraded, all weapons break the 9,999 damage cap and deal more damage as the wielder's HP approaches maximum. Upgrade all weapons at the spherical crystal in Macalania Woods using the Celestial Mirror (upgrade the Cloudy Mirror from Remiem at that same crystal). Tidus: Caladbolg (Calm Lands NW path after defeating trainer) + Sun Crest (Zanarkand staircase after Yunalesca) + Sun Sigil (sub-0:00 chocobo race). Yuna: Nirvana (capture all 9 Calm Lands fiends) + Moon Crest (Besaid cove) + Moon Sigil (Remiem Temple, all 8 aeons). Lulu: Onion Knight (Baaj Temple underwater) + Venus Crest (Farplane) + Venus Sigil (dodge 200 lightning bolts). Kimahri: Spirit Lance (three Thunder Plains Qactuar stones) + Saturn Crest (Mt. Gagazet chest) + Saturn Sigil (third Butterfly Chase in Macalania). Auron: Masamune (Rusty Sword to Mi'ihen statue glyph) + Mars Crest (Mi'ihen Oldroad South) + Mars Sigil (10 Area/Species Conquests). Wakka: World Champion (win 5 blitzball games + Celestial Mirror, Luca bartender) + Jupiter Crest (Luca Aurochs locker room) + Jupiter Sigil (blitzball prize after winning Attack/Status/Auroch Reels). Rikku: Godhand (airship password GODHAND, north ravine) + Mercury Crest (sandy whirlpool in Sanubia) + Mercury Sigil (clear Cactuar Village sandstorm).

items.name: Caladbolg (Tidus — Calm Lands NW path, defeat Chocobo trainer)
Sun Crest (Tidus — Zanarkand staircase after Yunalesca)
Sun Sigil (Tidus — Calm Lands chocobo race, sub-0:00 finish)
Nirvana (Yuna — capture all 9 Calm Lands fiend types)
Moon Crest (Yuna — Besaid Isle cove chest)
Venus Crest (Lulu — Farplane chest, return to Guadosalam)
Venus Sigil (Lulu — dodge 200 consecutive lightning bolts, Thunder Plains)
Spirit Lance (Kimahri — three Qactuar stones + ghost, Thunder Plains)
Saturn Crest (Kimahri — chest past Seymour on Mt. Gagazet)
Saturn Sigil (Kimahri — third Butterfly Chase, Macalania Woods)
Masamune (Auron — Rusty Sword to Mi'ihen statue glyph)
Mars Crest (Auron — Mi'ihen Oldroad South chest)
Mars Sigil (Auron — complete 10 Area/Species Conquests at Monster Arena)
World Champion (Wakka — win 5 blitzball games, then Celestial Mirror at Luca bartender)
Jupiter Crest (Wakka — Luca Aurochs locker room chest)
Jupiter Sigil (Wakka — blitzball prize after winning Attack/Status/Auroch Reels)
Mercury Crest (Rikku — sandy whirlpool chest in Sanubia Sands)

optionalAreas.name: Cactuar Village (Bikanel Desert Revisit)
optionalAreas.prose: At a large Cactuar-painted rock in the southern part of Sanubia Sands — West, examine the stone to begin the hunt. A clue points to one of 10 hidden Cactuars scattered across the desert. Sneak up while each Cactuar faces away and touch it before it spots you three times — success triggers a fight; win or lose you receive a named Cactuar Sphere. If it catches you three times, you receive a Sphere del Perdedor instead. The number of named spheres you insert determines your prize tier: 1–2 = Potion, 3–6 = Elixir, 7–8 = Megalixir, 9–10 = Friend Sphere. Clearing all ten Cactuars lifts the sandstorm over the village, granting access to the Mercury Sigil for Rikku's Godhand and a Megalixir.

items.name: Mercury Sigil (Rikku — find and clear all 10 Cactuars)
Megalixir (cleared sandstorm village)

optionalAreas.name: Monster Arena (Calm Lands)
optionalAreas.prose: Buy Capture weapons from the arena owner and use them to defeat (not just KO) monsters throughout all areas of Spira — some species only appear in specific sub-zones, so explore widely. Capturing all fiends in an area unlocks an Area Conquest boss; capturing enough of each species type unlocks Species Conquest bosses. These creations drop rare upgrade materials unavailable elsewhere. The highest tier — Original Creations — unlocks progressively as you complete more conquests, culminating in Nemesis (capture 10 of every fiend in every area). Capturing four of every Dragon-type enemy yields 99 Purifying Salts — the material needed to customize No Encounters onto armor, which is invaluable for farming during side quests. Yuna's Nirvana is received from the arena owner after capturing all nine Calm Lands fiend types. The Mars Sigil for Auron's Masamune requires completing at least 10 Area Conquest and/or Species Conquest missions.

items.name: Nirvana (Yuna — capture all 9 Calm Lands fiend types)
Mars Sigil (Auron — complete 10 Area and/or Species Conquests)

optionalAreas.name: Dark Aeons & Penance
optionalAreas.prose: After acquiring the Airship, Yevonite zealots station dark aeon summoners at locations throughout Spira. These super-powered aeons and the superboss they unlock are the game's ultimate challenge — expect to invest 50–100 hours of preparation. For Dark Aeon locations, strategies, and Penance, see the Superbosses page.
